import json import pandas as pd from pathlib import Path from typing import Annotated, List import plotly.graph_objects as go from loguru import logger from cyclopts import Parameter import dash from dash import dcc, html, dash_table, Input, Output, State import dash_bootstrap_components as dbc def plot_weight_norms_interactive( data_dir: Annotated[ str, Parameter(help="Path to the directory containing model subdirectories") ], param_name: Annotated[ str, Parameter(help="Parameter name to plot (e.g., lm_head.weight)") ] = "lm_head.weight", metrics: Annotated[ List[str], Parameter( help="Metrics to plot (e.g., ['l2_norm', 'rms_norm']). Can specify multiple metrics." ), ] = None, port: Annotated[int, Parameter(help="Port for the Dash web server")] = 8050, ): """交互式多指标展示""" path_obj = Path(data_dir) if not path_obj.exists(): raise FileNotFoundError(f"Data directory does not exist: {data_dir}") if metrics is None: metrics = ["l2_norm", "rms_norm"] elif isinstance(metrics, str): metrics = [metrics] valid_metrics = ["l2_norm", "rms_norm"] for metric in metrics: if metric not in valid_metrics: raise ValueError(f"Metric must be one of {valid_metrics}, got: {metric}") logger.info(f"Loading data from: {data_dir}") logger.info(f"Plotting parameter: {param_name}") logger.info(f"Metrics: {metrics}") # ========== 数据收集 ========== all_data = {} model_names = [] for model_dir in sorted(path_obj.iterdir()): if not model_dir.is_dir(): continue model_name = model_dir.name model_names.append(model_name) logger.info(f"Processing model: {model_name}") for json_file in sorted(model_dir.glob("*.json")): try: step_str = json_file.stem if step_str.isdigit(): step = int(step_str) else: import re numbers = re.findall(r"\d+", step_str) if numbers: step = int(numbers[0]) else: logger.warning( f"Could not extract step number from: {json_file}" ) continue with json_file.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as f: data = json.load(f) if param_name in data: param_data = data[param_name] for metric in metrics: if metric in param_data: value = param_data[metric] key = (model_name, step, metric) if key not in all_data: all_data[key] = { "step": step, "model": model_name, "param": param_name, "metric": metric, "value": value, } except Exception as e: logger.error(f"Error processing {json_file}: {e}") if not all_data: raise ValueError( f"No data found for parameter '{param_name}' with metrics {metrics}" ) df = pd.DataFrame(list(all_data.values())) # ========== 准备每个指标的数据 ========== colors = [ "#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd", "#8c564b", "#e377c2", "#7f7f7f", "#bcbd22", "#17becf", ] # 为每个指标准备所有需要的数据和图表 metric_configs = {} for metric in metrics: metric_df = df[df["metric"] == metric].copy() metric_df = metric_df.sort_values("step") metric_display = {"l2_norm": "L2范数", "rms_norm": "RMS范数"}.get( metric, metric ) # 创建汇总表 summary_data = [] for model_name in model_names: model_df = metric_df[metric_df["model"] == model_name] if len(model_df) > 0: last_value = model_df.iloc[-1]["value"] summary_data.append( { "模型名称": model_name, "Steps": len(model_df), "起始Step": model_df["step"].min(), "结束Step": model_df["step"].max(), f"最后{metric_display}": round(last_value, 6), f"平均{metric_display}": round(model_df["value"].mean(), 6), f"最大{metric_display}": round(model_df["value"].max(), 6), f"最小{metric_display}": round(model_df["value"].min(), 6), } ) summary_df = pd.DataFrame(summary_data) # 创建详细表 detail_df = metric_df[["model", "step", "value"]].copy() detail_df = detail_df.rename( columns={"model": "模型名称", "step": "Step", "value": metric_display} ) detail_df[metric_display] = detail_df[metric_display].round(6) # 创建小图 small_fig = go.Figure() for i, model_name in enumerate(model_names): model_df = metric_df[metric_df["model"] == model_name] if len(model_df) > 0: color = colors[i % len(colors)] small_fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( x=model_df["step"], y=model_df["value"], mode="lines+markers", name=model_name, line=dict(width=1.5, color=color), marker=dict(size=3, color=color), hovertemplate=f"{model_name}
Step: %{{x}}
{metric_display}: %{{y:.6f}}", ) ) small_fig.update_layout( title=metric_display, xaxis_title="Step", yaxis_title=metric_display, height=250, hovermode="x unified", showlegend=False, template="plotly_white", margin=dict(l=50, r=20, t=50, b=50), ) # 创建大图 large_fig = go.Figure() for i, model_name in enumerate(model_names): model_df = metric_df[metric_df["model"] == model_name] if len(model_df) > 0: color = colors[i % len(colors)] large_fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( x=model_df["step"], y=model_df["value"], mode="lines+markers", name=model_name, line=dict(width=2, color=color), marker=dict(size=6, color=color), hovertemplate=f"{model_name}
Step: %{{x}}
{metric_display}: %{{y:.6f}}", ) ) large_fig.update_layout( title=f"{param_name} 的 {metric_display} 变化趋势", xaxis_title="训练步数 (Step)", yaxis_title=metric_display, hovermode="x unified", showlegend=True, legend=dict( yanchor="top", y=0.99, xanchor="left", x=0.01, bgcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)", bordercolor="black", borderwidth=1, ), template="plotly_white", height=600, ) metric_configs[metric] = { "display_name": metric_display, "summary_df": summary_df, "detail_df": detail_df, "small_fig": small_fig, "large_fig": large_fig, } # ========== 创建 Dash 应用 ========== dash_app = dash.Dash(__name__, external_stylesheets=[dbc.themes.BOOTSTRAP]) # 创建初始的小图网格 small_graph_cards = [] for metric in metrics: config = metric_configs[metric] small_graph_cards.append( dbc.Col( [ dbc.Card( [ dbc.CardBody( [ dcc.Graph( figure=config["small_fig"], style={"height": "250px"}, config={"displayModeBar": False}, ), dbc.Button( f"查看 {config['display_name']} 详情", id=f"btn-{metric}", color="primary", size="sm", className="w-100 mt-2", ), ] ), ], className="h-100", ), ], width=6, className="mb-3", ) ) # 布局 - 关键：所有组件都预先创建，只是控制显示隐藏 dash_app.layout = dbc.Container( [ # 存储当前选中的指标 dcc.Store(id="selected-metric", data=None), # 标题 dbc.Row( [ dbc.Col( [ html.H1( f"参数监控: {param_name}", className="text-center my-4" ), html.P( f"监控指标: {', '.join([metric_configs[m]['display_name'] for m in metrics])}", className="text-center text-muted", ), ], width=12, ) ] ), # 主内容区域 dbc.Row( [ # 左侧：图表区域 dbc.Col( [ html.H3("趋势图表", className="mt-3"), html.P( "点击下方按钮可放大查看详情", className="text-muted", id="hint-text", ), # 小图网格（初始显示） html.Div( id="small-graphs-container", children=dbc.Row(small_graph_cards), style={"display": "block"}, ), # 大图容器（初始隐藏） html.Div( id="large-graph-container", children=[ dcc.Graph( id="large-graph", style={"height": "600px"} ), dbc.Button( "返回概览", id="btn-back", color="secondary", className="mt-2", ), ], style={"display": "none"}, ), ], width=7, ), # 右侧：数据表格区域 dbc.Col( [ html.H3("数据明细", className="mt-3"), html.Div(id="data-tables-container"), ], width=5, ), ] ), # 页脚 dbc.Row( [ dbc.Col( [ html.Div( [ html.Small( f"数据目录: {data_dir}", className="text-muted" ), html.Br(), html.Small( f"参数: {param_name} | 指标: {', '.join(metrics)}", className="text-muted", ), ], className="mt-4 text-center", ) ], width=12, ) ] ), ], fluid=True, ) # ========== 回调函数 ========== # 回调1：处理指标选择按钮 @dash_app.callback( Output("selected-metric", "data"), [Input(f"btn-{metric}", "n_clicks") for metric in metrics] + [Input("btn-back", "n_clicks")], State("selected-metric", "data"), prevent_initial_call=True, ) def handle_metric_selection(*args): ctx = dash.callback_context if not ctx.triggered: return dash.no_update button_id = ctx.triggered[0]["prop_id"].split(".")[0] # 点击返回按钮 if button_id == "btn-back": return None # 点击指标按钮 for metric in metrics: if button_id == f"btn-{metric}": logger.info(f"Selected metric: {metric}") return metric return dash.no_update # 回调2：控制图表区域的显示/隐藏和内容更新 @dash_app.callback( [ Output("small-graphs-container", "style"), Output("large-graph-container", "style"), Output("large-graph", "figure"), Output("hint-text", "children"), ], Input("selected-metric", "data"), prevent_initial_call=False, ) def update_graph_area(selected_metric): if selected_metric is None: # 显示小图网格 return ( {"display": "block"}, {"display": "none"}, {}, "点击下方按钮可放大查看详情", ) else: # 显示大图 config = metric_configs[selected_metric] return ( {"display": "none"}, {"display": "block"}, config["large_fig"], "点击返回按钮查看其他指标", ) # 回调3：更新数据表格区域 @dash_app.callback( Output("data-tables-container", "children"), Input("selected-metric", "data"), prevent_initial_call=False, ) def update_data_tables(selected_metric): if selected_metric is None: return html.P( "点击左侧按钮查看对应指标的数据明细", className="text-muted text-center mt-5", ) config = metric_configs[selected_metric] summary_df = config["summary_df"] detail_df = config["detail_df"] display_name = config["display_name"] return html.Div( [ html.H4(f"{display_name} 汇总"), html.P("可导出为 CSV", className="text-muted small"), dash_table.DataTable( columns=[{"name": col, "id": col} for col in summary_df.columns], data=summary_df.to_dict("records"), export_format="csv", export_headers="display", style_table={"overflowX": "auto"}, style_cell={ "textAlign": "center", "padding": "8px", "fontSize": "14px", }, style_header={"backgroundColor": "#f8f9fa", "fontWeight": "bold"}, style_data_conditional=[ { "if": {"row_index": "odd"}, "backgroundColor": "rgb(248, 248, 248)", } ], ), html.Hr(className="my-4"), html.H4("详细数据"), html.P(f"共 {len(detail_df)} 条记录", className="text-muted small"), dash_table.DataTable( columns=[{"name": col, "id": col} for col in detail_df.columns], data=detail_df.to_dict("records"), page_size=15, export_format="csv", export_headers="display", style_table={"height": "400px", "overflowY": "auto"}, style_cell={ "textAlign": "center", "padding": "6px", "fontSize": "12px", }, style_header={"backgroundColor": "#e9ecef", "fontWeight": "bold"}, ), ] ) logger.info(f"Starting web server on http://localhost:{port}") logger.info(f"Found {len(model_names)} models: {', '.join(model_names)}") logger.info(f"Total data points: {len(df)}") dash_app.run(debug=False, host="0.0.0.0", port=port) 我有这样一个脚本，功能是把一个文件夹下的大量文件整合在一起然后 plot，请帮我重构一下这个核心函数，中间提取数据的部分拆分出来作为另一个函数，然后我希望实现这样一个功能： 我发现原来绘制 lm head 的两种 norm 其实没什么意义，更重要的是，针对模型的每一层都绘制出一张 RMS norm 的图。我的模型有很多层，你暂时可以假设我的每个 json 文件里面包含两个 key { "model.embed_tokens.weight": { "shape": [ 151936, 2048 ], "numel": 311164928, "l2_norm": 546.4895629882812, "rms_norm": 0.03098036653169573 }, "lm_head.weight": { "shape": [ 151936, 2048 ], "numel": 311164928, "l2_norm": 764.6820068359375, "rms_norm": 0.04334964554936616 } }，先可视化这样两张图，图片标题完全可以把 .weight 后缀去掉

Thought for 7 seconds > 用户想要重构这个函数，主要需求是： > 1. 将数据提取部分拆分成独立的函数 > 2. 改变可视化逻辑：不再是为一个参数绘制多个指标，而是为每个参数（层）绘制一个指标（RMS norm） > 3. 示例数据有两个参数：model.embed_tokens.weight 和 lm_head.weight > 4. 图片标题要去掉 .weight 后缀 > > 让我重构这个代码： > > 1. 首先创建一个数据加载函数 `load_model_metrics_data` > 2. 然后修改主函数，改为按参数分组而不是按指标分组 > 3. 每个参数显示一个固定指标（rms_norm）的趋势图 > > 重构思路： > - `load_model_metrics_data(data_dir, param_names=None, metrics=None)` - 加载所有数据 > - `plot_weight_norms_interactive` - 主函数，调用加载函数并创建可视化 > > 新的逻辑： > - 如果 param_names 为 None，自动发现所有参数 > - 为每个参数创建一个图表，显示指定的指标（默认 rms_norm） > - 布局类似，左侧显示小图网格，点击后显示大图，右侧显示数据表格
# 重构后的代码 ```python import json import pandas as pd from pathlib import Path from typing import Annotated, List, Optional, Dict, Tuple import plotly.graph_objects as go from loguru import logger from cyclopts import Parameter import dash from dash import dcc, html, dash_table, Input, Output, State import dash_bootstrap_components as dbc def load_model_metrics_data( data_dir: str, param_names: Optional[List[str]] = None, metrics: Optional[List[str]] = None, ) -> Tuple[pd.DataFrame, List[str], List[str]]: """ 从目录中加载模型参数指标数据 Args: data_dir: 包含模型子目录的数据目录路径 param_names: 要加载的参数名列表，None 表示加载所有参数 metrics: 要加载的指标列表，None 表示加载所有指标 Returns: (DataFrame, 模型名称列表, 参数名称列表) """ path_obj = Path(data_dir) if not path_obj.exists(): raise FileNotFoundError(f"Data directory does not exist: {data_dir}") logger.info(f"Loading data from: {data_dir}") all_data = {} model_names = [] discovered_params = set() # 遍历所有模型目录 for model_dir in sorted(path_obj.iterdir()): if not model_dir.is_dir(): continue model_name = model_dir.name model_names.append(model_name) logger.info(f"Processing model: {model_name}") # 遍历该模型的所有 JSON 文件 for json_file in sorted(model_dir.glob("*.json")): try: # 提取 step 编号 step_str = json_file.stem if step_str.isdigit(): step = int(step_str) else: import re numbers = re.findall(r"\d+", step_str) if numbers: step = int(numbers[0]) else: logger.warning(f"Could not extract step number from: {json_file}") continue # 加载 JSON 数据 with json_file.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as f: data = json.load(f) # 遍历所有参数 for param_name, param_data in data.items(): discovered_params.add(param_name) # 如果指定了参数列表，只处理在列表中的参数 if param_names is not None and param_name not in param_names: continue # 遍历该参数的所有指标 for metric_name, value in param_data.items(): # 跳过非指标字段 if metric_name in ["shape", "numel"]: continue # 如果指定了指标列表，只处理在列表中的指标 if metrics is not None and metric_name not in metrics: continue # 存储数据 key = (model_name, step, param_name, metric_name) if key not in all_data: all_data[key] = { "step": step, "model": model_name, "param": param_name, "metric": metric_name, "value": value, } except Exception as e: logger.error(f"Error processing {json_file}: {e}") if not all_data: raise ValueError(f"No data found in {data_dir}") df = pd.DataFrame(list(all_data.values())) # 确定最终的参数列表 if param_names is None: param_names = sorted(discovered_params) logger.info(f"Loaded {len(df)} data points") logger.info(f"Found {len(model_names)} models: {', '.join(model_names)}") logger.info(f"Found {len(param_names)} parameters: {', '.join(param_names)}") return df, model_names, param_names def plot_weight_norms_interactive( data_dir: Annotated[ str, Parameter(help="Path to the directory containing model subdirectories") ], metric: Annotated[ str, Parameter(help="Metric to plot (e.g., 'rms_norm', 'l2_norm')") ] = "rms_norm", param_names: Annotated[ Optional[List[str]], Parameter(help="Parameter names to plot. If not specified, will plot all discovered parameters."), ] = None, port: Annotated[int, Parameter(help="Port for the Dash web server")] = 8050, ): """ 交互式可视化多层参数的指标变化 为每个参数（层）创建一个图表，显示指定指标在训练过程中的变化趋势 """ # ========== 加载数据 ========== df, model_names, param_names = load_model_metrics_data( data_dir=data_dir, param_names=param_names, metrics=[metric], ) logger.info(f"Plotting metric: {metric}") logger.info(f"Parameters: {', '.join(param_names)}") # ========== 准备每个参数的数据和图表 ========== colors = [ "#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd", "#8c564b", "#e377c2", "#7f7f7f", "#bcbd22", "#17becf", ] metric_display_names = { "l2_norm": "L2 范数", "rms_norm": "RMS 范数", "mean": "均值", "std": "标准差", "max": "最大值", "min": "最小值", } metric_display = metric_display_names.get(metric, metric) param_configs = {} for param_name in param_names: # 过滤出该参数的数据 param_df = df[(df["param"] == param_name) & (df["metric"] == metric)].copy() param_df = param_df.sort_values("step") if len(param_df) == 0: logger.warning(f"No data found for parameter: {param_name}") continue # 参数显示名称（去掉 .weight 后缀） param_display = param_name.replace(".weight", "").replace("model.", "") # ========== 创建汇总表 ========== summary_data = [] for model_name in model_names: model_df = param_df[param_df["model"] == model_name] if len(model_df) > 0: last_value = model_df.iloc[-1]["value"] summary_data.append({ "模型名称": model_name, "Steps": len(model_df), "起始Step": int(model_df["step"].min()), "结束Step": int(model_df["step"].max()), f"最后{metric_display}": round(last_value, 6), f"平均{metric_display}": round(model_df["value"].mean(), 6), f"最大{metric_display}": round(model_df["value"].max(), 6), f"最小{metric_display}": round(model_df["value"].min(), 6), }) summary_df = pd.DataFrame(summary_data) # ========== 创建详细表 ========== detail_df = param_df[["model", "step", "value"]].copy() detail_df = detail_df.rename(columns={ "model": "模型名称", "step": "Step", "value": metric_display, }) detail_df[metric_display] = detail_df[metric_display].round(6) # ========== 创建小图 ========== small_fig = go.Figure() for i, model_name in enumerate(model_names): model_df = param_df[param_df["model"] == model_name] if len(model_df) > 0: color = colors[i % len(colors)] small_fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( x=model_df["step"], y=model_df["value"], mode="lines+markers", name=model_name, line=dict(width=1.5, color=color), marker=dict(size=3, color=color), hovertemplate=f"{model_name}
Step: %{{x}}
{metric_display}: %{{y:.6f}}", ) ) small_fig.update_layout( title=param_display, xaxis_title="Step", yaxis_title=metric_display, height=250, hovermode="x unified", showlegend=False, template="plotly_white", margin=dict(l=50, r=20, t=50, b=50), ) # ========== 创建大图 ========== large_fig = go.Figure() for i, model_name in enumerate(model_names): model_df = param_df[param_df["model"] == model_name] if len(model_df) > 0: color = colors[i % len(colors)] large_fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( x=model_df["step"], y=model_df["value"], mode="lines+markers", name=model_name, line=dict(width=2, color=color), marker=dict(size=6, color=color), hovertemplate=f"{model_name}
Step: %{{x}}
{metric_display}: %{{y:.6f}}", ) ) large_fig.update_layout( title=f"{param_display} 的 {metric_display} 变化趋势", xaxis_title="训练步数 (Step)", yaxis_title=metric_display, hovermode="x unified", showlegend=True, legend=dict( yanchor="top", y=0.99, xanchor="left", x=0.01, bgcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)", bordercolor="black", borderwidth=1, ), template="plotly_white", height=600, ) param_configs[param_name] = { "display_name": param_display, "summary_df": summary_df, "detail_df": detail_df, "small_fig": small_fig, "large_fig": large_fig, } if not param_configs: raise ValueError(f"No valid data found for any parameters") # ========== 创建 Dash 应用 ========== dash_app = dash.Dash(__name__, external_stylesheets=[dbc.themes.BOOTSTRAP]) # 创建小图网格 small_graph_cards = [] for param_name in param_names: if param_name not in param_configs: continue config = param_configs[param_name] small_graph_cards.append( dbc.Col( [ dbc.Card( [ dbc.CardBody( [ dcc.Graph( figure=config["small_fig"], style={"height": "250px"}, config={"displayModeBar": False}, ), dbc.Button( f"查看详情", id=f"btn-{param_name}", color="primary", size="sm", className="w-100 mt-2", ), ] ), ], className="h-100", ), ], width=6, className="mb-3", ) ) # ========== 创建布局 ========== dash_app.layout = dbc.Container( [ # 存储当前选中的参数 dcc.Store(id="selected-param", data=None), # 标题 dbc.Row([ dbc.Col([ html.H1(f"参数监控: {metric_display}", className="text-center my-4"), html.P( f"监控 {len(param_configs)} 个参数层", className="text-center text-muted", ), ], width=12) ]), # 主内容区域 dbc.Row([ # 左侧：图表区域 dbc.Col([ html.H3("趋势图表", className="mt-3"), html.P( "点击下方按钮可放大查看详情", className="text-muted", id="hint-text", ), # 小图网格（初始显示） html.Div( id="small-graphs-container", children=dbc.Row(small_graph_cards), style={"display": "block"}, ), # 大图容器（初始隐藏） html.Div( id="large-graph-container", children=[ dcc.Graph(id="large-graph", style={"height": "600px"}), dbc.Button( "返回概览", id="btn-back", color="secondary", className="mt-2", ), ], style={"display": "none"}, ), ], width=7), # 右侧：数据表格区域 dbc.Col([ html.H3("数据明细", className="mt-3"), html.Div(id="data-tables-container"), ], width=5), ]), # 页脚 dbc.Row([ dbc.Col([ html.Div([ html.Small(f"数据目录: {data_dir}", className="text-muted"), html.Br(), html.Small( f"指标: {metric} | 参数: {len(param_configs)} 个", className="text-muted", ), ], className="mt-4 text-center") ], width=12) ]), ], fluid=True, ) # ========== 回调函数 ========== # 回调1：处理参数选择按钮 @dash_app.callback( Output("selected-param", "data"), [Input(f"btn-{param_name}", "n_clicks") for param_name in param_configs.keys()] + [Input("btn-back", "n_clicks")], State("selected-param", "data"), prevent_initial_call=True, ) def handle_param_selection(*args): ctx = dash.callback_context if not ctx.triggered: return dash.no_update button_id = ctx.triggered[0]["prop_id"].split(".")[0] # 点击返回按钮 if button_id == "btn-back": return None # 点击参数按钮 for param_name in param_configs.keys(): if button_id == f"btn-{param_name}": logger.info(f"Selected parameter: {param_name}") return param_name return dash.no_update # 回调2：控制图表区域的显示/隐藏和内容更新 @dash_app.callback( [ Output("small-graphs-container", "style"), Output("large-graph-container", "style"), Output("large-graph", "figure"), Output("hint-text", "children"), ], Input("selected-param", "data"), prevent_initial_call=False, ) def update_graph_area(selected_param): if selected_param is None: # 显示小图网格 return ( {"display": "block"}, {"display": "none"}, {}, "点击下方按钮可放大查看详情", ) else: # 显示大图 config = param_configs[selected_param] return ( {"display": "none"}, {"display": "block"}, config["large_fig"], f"正在查看: {config['display_name']}", ) # 回调3：更新数据表格区域 @dash_app.callback( Output("data-tables-container", "children"), Input("selected-param", "data"), prevent_initial_call=False, ) def update_data_tables(selected_param): if selected_param is None: return html.P( "点击左侧按钮查看对应参数的数据明细", className="text-muted text-center mt-5", ) config = param_configs[selected_param] summary_df = config["summary_df"] detail_df = config["detail_df"] display_name = config["display_name"] return html.Div([ html.H4(f"{display_name} 汇总"), html.P("可导出为 CSV", className="text-muted small"), dash_table.DataTable( columns=[{"name": col, "id": col} for col in summary_df.columns], data=summary_df.to_dict("records"), export_format="csv", export_headers="display", style_table={"overflowX": "auto"}, style_cell={ "textAlign": "center", "padding": "8px", "fontSize": "14px", }, style_header={ "backgroundColor": "#f8f9fa", "fontWeight": "bold" }, style_data_conditional=[ { "if": {"row_index": "odd"}, "backgroundColor": "rgb(248, 248, 248)", } ], ), html.Hr(className="my-4"), html.H4("详细数据"), html.P(f"共 {len(detail_df)} 条记录", className="text-muted small"), dash_table.DataTable( columns=[{"name": col, "id": col} for col in detail_df.columns], data=detail_df.to_dict("records"), page_size=15, export_format="csv", export_headers="display", style_table={"height": "400px", "overflowY": "auto"}, style_cell={ "textAlign": "center", "padding": "6px", "fontSize": "12px", }, style_header={ "backgroundColor": "#e9ecef", "fontWeight": "bold" }, ), ]) # ========== 启动服务器 ========== logger.info(f"Starting web server on http://localhost:{port}") logger.info(f"Found {len(model_names)} models: {', '.join(model_names)}") logger.info(f"Total data points: {len(df)}") dash_app.run(debug=False, host="0.0.0.0", port=port) # 使用示例 if __name__ == "__main__": plot_weight_norms_interactive( data_dir="./model_metrics", metric="rms_norm", param_names=None, # 自动发现所有参数 port=8050, ) ``` ## 主要改进点 1. **提取了数据加载函数** `load_model_metrics_data`： - 独立的数据加载逻辑 - 返回 DataFrame、模型列表和参数列表 - 支持参数和指标的过滤 - 自动发现所有参数 2. **改变了可视化逻辑**： - 从"一个参数多个指标"改为"多个参数一个指标" - 每个参数（层）一个图表 - 自动去除 `.weight` 后缀和 `model.` 前缀 3. **更灵活的参数**： - `metric`: 单个指标（默认 `rms_norm`） - `param_names`: 可选参数列表，None 时自动发现所有参数 4. **保持了原有的交互功能**： - 小图网格概览 - 点击查看大图详情 - 数据表格展示和导出 使用方式： ```bash python script.py --data-dir ./metrics --metric rms_norm ```

Thought for 4 seconds > 用户遇到了一个错误，因为在 Dash 中，组件 ID 不能包含 `.` 字符。问题出在我使用参数名（如 `lm_head.weight`）直接作为按钮 ID 的一部分。 > > 用户建议直接把 `.weight` 后缀去掉，并且把剩下的 `.` 替换为 `_` 或其他符号。 > > 我需要： > 1. 创建一个函数来清理参数名，用于生成有效的组件 ID > 2. 在所有使用参数名作为 ID 的地方使用这个清理后的名称 > 3. 但在显示时仍然使用友好的显示名称 > > 让我修改代码： > - 添加一个函数来生成安全的 ID > - 在创建按钮和回调时使用安全的 ID > - 需要维护一个映射关系，从安全 ID 到原始参数名
明白了！Dash 的组件 ID 不能包含 `.` 字符。我来修复这个问题： ```python import json import pandas as pd from pathlib import Path from typing import Annotated, List, Optional, Dict, Tuple import plotly.graph_objects as go from loguru import logger from cyclopts import Parameter import dash from dash import dcc, html, dash_table, Input, Output, State import dash_bootstrap_components as dbc def sanitize_param_name(param_name: str) -> str: """ 清理参数名，生成有效的组件 ID - 移除 .weight 后缀 - 将所有 . 替换为 _ """ # 移除 .weight 后缀 if param_name.endswith(".weight"): param_name = param_name[:-7] # 移除 model. 前缀 if param_name.startswith("model."): param_name = param_name[6:] # 替换 . 为 _ param_name = param_name.replace(".", "_") return param_name def get_display_name(param_name: str) -> str: """ 获取参数的显示名称 """ # 移除 .weight 后缀 if param_name.endswith(".weight"): param_name = param_name[:-7] # 移除 model. 前缀 if param_name.startswith("model."): param_name = param_name[6:] return param_name def load_model_metrics_data( data_dir: str, param_names: Optional[List[str]] = None, metrics: Optional[List[str]] = None, ) -> Tuple[pd.DataFrame, List[str], List[str]]: """ 从目录中加载模型参数指标数据 Args: data_dir: 包含模型子目录的数据目录路径 param_names: 要加载的参数名列表，None 表示加载所有参数 metrics: 要加载的指标列表，None 表示加载所有指标 Returns: (DataFrame, 模型名称列表, 参数名称列表) """ path_obj = Path(data_dir) if not path_obj.exists(): raise FileNotFoundError(f"Data directory does not exist: {data_dir}") logger.info(f"Loading data from: {data_dir}") all_data = {} model_names = [] discovered_params = set() # 遍历所有模型目录 for model_dir in sorted(path_obj.iterdir()): if not model_dir.is_dir(): continue model_name = model_dir.name model_names.append(model_name) logger.info(f"Processing model: {model_name}") # 遍历该模型的所有 JSON 文件 for json_file in sorted(model_dir.glob("*.json")): try: # 提取 step 编号 step_str = json_file.stem if step_str.isdigit(): step = int(step_str) else: import re numbers = re.findall(r"\d+", step_str) if numbers: step = int(numbers[0]) else: logger.warning(f"Could not extract step number from: {json_file}") continue # 加载 JSON 数据 with json_file.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as f: data = json.load(f) # 遍历所有参数 for param_name, param_data in data.items(): discovered_params.add(param_name) # 如果指定了参数列表，只处理在列表中的参数 if param_names is not None and param_name not in param_names: continue # 遍历该参数的所有指标 for metric_name, value in param_data.items(): # 跳过非指标字段 if metric_name in ["shape", "numel"]: continue # 如果指定了指标列表，只处理在列表中的指标 if metrics is not None and metric_name not in metrics: continue # 存储数据 key = (model_name, step, param_name, metric_name) if key not in all_data: all_data[key] = { "step": step, "model": model_name, "param": param_name, "metric": metric_name, "value": value, } except Exception as e: logger.error(f"Error processing {json_file}: {e}") if not all_data: raise ValueError(f"No data found in {data_dir}") df = pd.DataFrame(list(all_data.values())) # 确定最终的参数列表 if param_names is None: param_names = sorted(discovered_params) logger.info(f"Loaded {len(df)} data points") logger.info(f"Found {len(model_names)} models: {', '.join(model_names)}") logger.info(f"Found {len(param_names)} parameters: {', '.join(param_names)}") return df, model_names, param_names def plot_weight_norms_interactive( data_dir: Annotated[ str, Parameter(help="Path to the directory containing model subdirectories") ], metric: Annotated[ str, Parameter(help="Metric to plot (e.g., 'rms_norm', 'l2_norm')") ] = "rms_norm", param_names: Annotated[ Optional[List[str]], Parameter(help="Parameter names to plot. If not specified, will plot all discovered parameters."), ] = None, port: Annotated[int, Parameter(help="Port for the Dash web server")] = 8050, ): """ 交互式可视化多层参数的指标变化 为每个参数（层）创建一个图表，显示指定指标在训练过程中的变化趋势 """ # ========== 加载数据 ========== df, model_names, param_names = load_model_metrics_data( data_dir=data_dir, param_names=param_names, metrics=[metric], ) logger.info(f"Plotting metric: {metric}") logger.info(f"Parameters: {', '.join(param_names)}") # ========== 准备每个参数的数据和图表 ========== colors = [ "#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd", "#8c564b", "#e377c2", "#7f7f7f", "#bcbd22", "#17becf", ] metric_display_names = { "l2_norm": "L2 范数", "rms_norm": "RMS 范数", "mean": "均值", "std": "标准差", "max": "最大值", "min": "最小值", } metric_display = metric_display_names.get(metric, metric) param_configs = {} param_id_to_name = {} # 从安全 ID 映射到原始参数名 for param_name in param_names: # 过滤出该参数的数据 param_df = df[(df["param"] == param_name) & (df["metric"] == metric)].copy() param_df = param_df.sort_values("step") if len(param_df) == 0: logger.warning(f"No data found for parameter: {param_name}") continue # 生成安全的 ID 和显示名称 param_id = sanitize_param_name(param_name) param_display = get_display_name(param_name) param_id_to_name[param_id] = param_name # ========== 创建汇总表 ========== summary_data = [] for model_name in model_names: model_df = param_df[param_df["model"] == model_name] if len(model_df) > 0: last_value = model_df.iloc[-1]["value"] summary_data.append({ "模型名称": model_name, "Steps": len(model_df), "起始Step": int(model_df["step"].min()), "结束Step": int(model_df["step"].max()), f"最后{metric_display}": round(last_value, 6), f"平均{metric_display}": round(model_df["value"].mean(), 6), f"最大{metric_display}": round(model_df["value"].max(), 6), f"最小{metric_display}": round(model_df["value"].min(), 6), }) summary_df = pd.DataFrame(summary_data) # ========== 创建详细表 ========== detail_df = param_df[["model", "step", "value"]].copy() detail_df = detail_df.rename(columns={ "model": "模型名称", "step": "Step", "value": metric_display, }) detail_df[metric_display] = detail_df[metric_display].round(6) # ========== 创建小图 ========== small_fig = go.Figure() for i, model_name in enumerate(model_names): model_df = param_df[param_df["model"] == model_name] if len(model_df) > 0: color = colors[i % len(colors)] small_fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( x=model_df["step"], y=model_df["value"], mode="lines+markers", name=model_name, line=dict(width=1.5, color=color), marker=dict(size=3, color=color), hovertemplate=f"{model_name}
Step: %{{x}}
{metric_display}: %{{y:.6f}}", ) ) small_fig.update_layout( title=param_display, xaxis_title="Step", yaxis_title=metric_display, height=250, hovermode="x unified", showlegend=False, template="plotly_white", margin=dict(l=50, r=20, t=50, b=50), ) # ========== 创建大图 ========== large_fig = go.Figure() for i, model_name in enumerate(model_names): model_df = param_df[param_df["model"] == model_name] if len(model_df) > 0: color = colors[i % len(colors)] large_fig.add_trace( go.Scatter( x=model_df["step"], y=model_df["value"], mode="lines+markers", name=model_name, line=dict(width=2, color=color), marker=dict(size=6, color=color), hovertemplate=f"{model_name}
Step: %{{x}}
{metric_display}: %{{y:.6f}}", ) ) large_fig.update_layout( title=f"{param_display} 的 {metric_display} 变化趋势", xaxis_title="训练步数 (Step)", yaxis_title=metric_display, hovermode="x unified", showlegend=True, legend=dict( yanchor="top", y=0.99, xanchor="left", x=0.01, bgcolor="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)", bordercolor="black", borderwidth=1, ), template="plotly_white", height=600, ) param_configs[param_id] = { "param_name": param_name, "display_name": param_display, "summary_df": summary_df, "detail_df": detail_df, "small_fig": small_fig, "large_fig": large_fig, } if not param_configs: raise ValueError(f"No valid data found for any parameters") # ========== 创建 Dash 应用 ========== dash_app = dash.Dash(__name__, external_stylesheets=[dbc.themes.BOOTSTRAP]) # 创建小图网格 small_graph_cards = [] for param_id in param_configs.keys(): config = param_configs[param_id] small_graph_cards.append( dbc.Col( [ dbc.Card( [ dbc.CardBody( [ dcc.Graph( figure=config["small_fig"], style={"height": "250px"}, config={"displayModeBar": False}, ), dbc.Button( f"查看详情", id=f"btn-{param_id}", color="primary", size="sm", className="w-100 mt-2", ), ] ), ], className="h-100", ), ], width=6, className="mb-3", ) ) # ========== 创建布局 ========== dash_app.layout = dbc.Container( [ # 存储当前选中的参数 ID dcc.Store(id="selected-param-id", data=None), # 标题 dbc.Row([ dbc.Col([ html.H1(f"参数监控: {metric_display}", className="text-center my-4"), html.P( f"监控 {len(param_configs)} 个参数层", className="text-center text-muted", ), ], width=12) ]), # 主内容区域 dbc.Row([ # 左侧：图表区域 dbc.Col([ html.H3("趋势图表", className="mt-3"), html.P( "点击下方按钮可放大查看详情", className="text-muted", id="hint-text", ), # 小图网格（初始显示） html.Div( id="small-graphs-container", children=dbc.Row(small_graph_cards), style={"display": "block"}, ), # 大图容器（初始隐藏） html.Div( id="large-graph-container", children=[ dcc.Graph(id="large-graph", style={"height": "600px"}), dbc.Button( "返回概览", id="btn-back", color="secondary", className="mt-2", ), ], style={"display": "none"}, ), ], width=7), # 右侧：数据表格区域 dbc.Col([ html.H3("数据明细", className="mt-3"), html.Div(id="data-tables-container"), ], width=5), ]), # 页脚 dbc.Row([ dbc.Col([ html.Div([ html.Small(f"数据目录: {data_dir}", className="text-muted"), html.Br(), html.Small( f"指标: {metric} | 参数: {len(param_configs)} 个", className="text-muted", ), ], className="mt-4 text-center") ], width=12) ]), ], fluid=True, ) # ========== 回调函数 ========== # 回调1：处理参数选择按钮 @dash_app.callback( Output("selected-param-id", "data"), [Input(f"btn-{param_id}", "n_clicks") for param_id in param_configs.keys()] + [Input("btn-back", "n_clicks")], State("selected-param-id", "data"), prevent_initial_call=True, ) def handle_param_selection(*args): ctx = dash.callback_context if not ctx.triggered: return dash.no_update button_id = ctx.triggered[0]["prop_id"].split(".")[0] # 点击返回按钮 if button_id == "btn-back": return None # 点击参数按钮 for param_id in param_configs.keys(): if button_id == f"btn-{param_id}": logger.info(f"Selected parameter: {param_configs[param_id]['param_name']}") return param_id return dash.no_update # 回调2：控制图表区域的显示/隐藏和内容更新 @dash_app.callback( [ Output("small-graphs-container", "style"), Output("large-graph-container", "style"), Output("large-graph", "figure"), Output("hint-text", "children"), ], Input("selected-param-id", "data"), prevent_initial_call=False, ) def update_graph_area(selected_param_id): if selected_param_id is None: # 显示小图网格 return ( {"display": "block"}, {"display": "none"}, {}, "点击下方按钮可放大查看详情", ) else: # 显示大图 config = param_configs[selected_param_id] return ( {"display": "none"}, {"display": "block"}, config["large_fig"], f"正在查看: {config['display_name']}", ) # 回调3：更新数据表格区域 @dash_app.callback( Output("data-tables-container", "children"), Input("selected-param-id", "data"), prevent_initial_call=False, ) def update_data_tables(selected_param_id): if selected_param_id is None: return html.P( "点击左侧按钮查看对应参数的数据明细", className="text-muted text-center mt-5", ) config = param_configs[selected_param_id] summary_df = config["summary_df"] detail_df = config["detail_df"] display_name = config["display_name"] return html.Div([ html.H4(f"{display_name} 汇总"), html.P("可导出为 CSV", className="text-muted small"), dash_table.DataTable( columns=[{"name": col, "id": col} for col in summary_df.columns], data=summary_df.to_dict("records"), export_format="csv", export_headers="display", style_table={"overflowX": "auto"}, style_cell={ "textAlign": "center", "padding": "8px", "fontSize": "14px", }, style_header={ "backgroundColor": "#f8f9fa", "fontWeight": "bold" }, style_data_conditional=[ { "if": {"row_index": "odd"}, "backgroundColor": "rgb(248, 248, 248)", } ], ), html.Hr(className="my-4"), html.H4("详细数据"), html.P(f"共 {len(detail_df)} 条记录", className="text-muted small"), dash_table.DataTable( columns=[{"name": col, "id": col} for col in detail_df.columns], data=detail_df.to_dict("records"), page_size=15, export_format="csv", export_headers="display", style_table={"height": "400px", "overflowY": "auto"}, style_cell={ "textAlign": "center", "padding": "6px", "fontSize": "12px", }, style_header={ "backgroundColor": "#e9ecef", "fontWeight": "bold" }, ), ]) # ========== 启动服务器 ========== logger.info(f"Starting web server on http://localhost:{port}") logger.info(f"Found {len(model_names)} models: {', '.join(model_names)}") logger.info(f"Total data points: {len(df)}") dash_app.run(debug=False, host="0.0.0.0", port=port) # 使用示例 if __name__ == "__main__": plot_weight_norms_interactive( data_dir="./model_metrics", metric="rms_norm", param_names=None, # 自动发现所有参数 port=8050, ) ``` ## 主要修改： 1. **新增 `sanitize_param_name()` 函数**： - 移除 `.weight` 后缀 - 移除 `model.` 前缀 - 将所有 `.` 替换为 `_` - 生成对 Dash 安全的组件 ID 2. **新增 `get_display_name()` 函数**： - 生成友好的显示名称 - 用于图表标题和表格显示 3. **维护 ID 映射**： - `param_id_to_name`: 从安全 ID 映射到原始参数名 - 在 `param_configs` 中同时存储 `param_name` 和 `display_name` 4. **所有组件 ID 使用清理后的名称**： - 按钮 ID: `btn-{param_id}` - Store 组件: `selected-param-id` - 但显示时使用 `display_name` 现在 `lm_head.weight` 会被转换为 `lm_head` 作为 ID，`embed_tokens` 保持不变，不会再有 `.` 引起的错误！

谢谢，你的脚本目前相当好，现在我有个更进阶的要求，具体的，只涉及到 load_model_metrics_data 这个函数，所以接下来你只需要写这个函数给我即可。
我的需求是这样的，我的 json 里 除了上述的 embed_tokens 和 lm_head，还会包含大量这样的 key: "model.layers.47.xxxx，这些带有 model.layer. 前缀的我们都认为是 decoder 部分的权重，请把这部分权重的 层数抽取出来，然后若干个参数才对应一个层，对这个层请计算整体的 rms_norm，具体的计算是把 l2_norm 的平方加起来，然后除以整体 numel之和的开根。，其他的参数保持原来的输出即可。
